source_name: Practice Directive 7/2021 - Lodgement of Annexure on Beneficial Ownership Information of Annual Return Lodged under Sections 68 and 576 of the Companies Act 2016 (Revised)
Practice Directive 7/2021 - Lodgement of Annexure on Beneficial Ownership Information of Annual Return Lodged under Sections 68 and 576 of the Companies Act 2016 (Revised)
part: SECTIONS 68 AND 576 OF THE COMPANIES ACT 2016
section: SECTIONS 68 AND 576 OF THE COMPANIES ACT 2016
section_title: SECTIONS 68 AND 576 OF THE COMPANIES ACT 2016
content:
1. This Practice Directive is issued pursuant to section 20C of
the Companies Commission of Malaysia Act 2001 and section 610
of the Companies Act 2016 (CA 2016).
2. Unless otherwise stated in this Practice Directive, the
requirements in the Practice Directive 1/2017 (PD 1/2017) and
Practice Directive 5/2018 will be applicable to the lodgement of
documents related to beneficial ownership information referred to
in this Practice Directive.

source_name: Practice Directive 7/2021 - Lodgement of Annexure on Beneficial Ownership Information of Annual Return Lodged under Sections 68 and 576 of the Companies Act 2016 (Revised)
content:
3. The objectives of this Practice Directive are:
(a) to clarify and streamline the lodgement of the
annexure of the beneficial ownership information (BO
information) accompanying the annual return
pursuant to paragraphs 68(3)(ia) and 576(2)(ha) of
the CA 2016; and

source_name: Practice Directive 7/2021 - Lodgement of Annexure on Beneficial Ownership Information of Annual Return Lodged under Sections 68 and 576 of the Companies Act 2016 (Revised)
content:
8 March 2021
(Revised: 1 December 2024)
(b) to determine the general requirements for the
lodgement of the documents and related matters.

source_name: Practice Directive 7/2021 - Lodgement of Annexure on Beneficial Ownership Information of Annual Return Lodged under Sections 68 and 576 of the Companies Act 2016 (Revised)
content:
4. All companies are required to submit the annexure of BO
information with annual return. The annexure is applicable to all
companies having anniversary dates from 1 December 2024.
5. Unless otherwise allowed by the Registrar, the lodgement of
annual return and the annexure of BO information must be made
through the Malaysian Business Reporting System (MBRS) Portal.
6. For the purposes of lodgement of BO information with annual
return, any change or update of particulars relating to the BO
information which is required to be lodged with the Registrar,
before the date of the anniversary date of the incorporation of the
company or before the date of the anniversary of the registration
date of the foreign company, shall be lodged via the Electronic
Beneficial Ownership System (e-BOS) before the annual return is
lodged. Please refer to the Practice Directive No. 9/2024 on the
requirements for lodgement of BO information through the e-BOS.
7. This Practice Directive reiterates the importance of
maintaining the documentations on BO information in accordance
with the "Guidelines for the Reporting Framework for Beneficial
Ownership of Companies" issued on 1 April 2024.

source_name: Practice Directive 7/2021 - Lodgement of Annexure on Beneficial Ownership Information of Annual Return Lodged under Sections 68 and 576 of the Companies Act 2016 (Revised)
content:
8. This Practice Directive revised the PD 1/2017 issued on 8
March 2021.
